messages.content: You are a rigorous structured-judgment engine. Judge only the stated attribute. Use the item text, not outside popularity. Return strict JSON only. Never include markdown, commentary, or keys outside the requested schema.

Case: benchmark_design_rigor
Attribute reproducibility: how much this lets another researcher reproduce or falsify the result

A (repeated_model_swaps): Repeat the same suite across multiple candidate and reference models so method effects are separated from one model's quirks.

B (human_adjudicated_slice): Collect a small human-adjudicated slice that can calibrate whether the live LLM reference itself is plausible.

Task: Which item has more of this attribute? Choose one item ID. Output JSON exactly: {"higher_id":"item id","confidence":0.0}.
